//: Gzipped-size budget for the web production bundle — apps/web/dist/assets/*.{js,css} only
//how: Enforced by apps/web/scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs after `vite build`. Gzip = node zlib default level (6), matching vite's own reported gzip column.
//bump: To raise a limit: build (`pnpm --filter @gilgamesh/web build`), read the printed actual gzip, set the new maxGzipBytes with ~15% headroom, and say why in the commit. Keep this a small, reviewable diff.

baseline.node: v24.16.0 local / node 22 in CI (zlib is stable across these; the headroom absorbs any drift)
baseline.//main: The admin console loads as a SEPARATE lazy chunk (routes-*.js 14.2 kB + routes-*.css 3.0 kB gzip) reached only at /admin — it does NOT inflate the initial/main index chunk (js 101.9 kB, still under the old 114 kB). But this gate sums ALL dist/assets, so the JS+CSS totals grew and the budgets were bumped.
baseline.//bump: Budgets = new gzip x ~1.12. NOTE for Phase 2: filling the admin view stubs grows the admin chunk further — re-measure and bump again at the Phase-2 -> main merge.
